settings.heading: What is the turnaround time for custom orders?
Can I request a specific design placement?
Do you offer bulk orders?
settings.row_content: Yes. For group orders or larger quantities, we offer bulk discounts. Visit our Bulk Orders page to get started.

settings.heading: What shipping options are available?
settings.row_content: We ship via USPS. Expedited options are available at checkout.

settings.heading: Can I return or exchange a custom item?
settings.row_content: All custom orders are final sale. If something arrives damaged or defective, contact us at support@shopemberlane.com and we'll make it right.

settings.heading: What thread colors are available?
settings.row_content: The full thread color palette is available to browse during the customization process.

settings.heading: I don't see the design I'm looking for. Can I request something custom?
settings.row_content: Reach out through our Contact page and we'll see what we can do.
